proof: function[T3: Zero](x0: Nat, x1: lib(fin).Fin[x0], x2: Nat, x3: lib(fin).Fin[x0] -> T3) { Option.some(x1) != lib(fin_sum).fin_of_nat_option(x0, x2) or fin_value_or_zero[T3](x0, x3, x2) = x3(x1) }[A](n.suc, fin_of_nat_suc(n, k), k, f)
function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat) { lib(fin_sum).fin_of_nat_option(x0, x1) = lib(fin).Fin[x0].new(x1) }(n.suc, k)

goal: exists(k0: lib(fin).Fin[n.suc]) { Option.some(k0) = fin_enum_suc(n).get_idx(idx) and map[lib(fin).Fin[n.suc], A](fin_enum_suc(n), f).get_idx(idx) = Option.some(f(k0)) }
exists(k0: lib(fin).Fin[n.suc]) { Option.some(k0) = fin_enum_suc(n).get_idx(idx) and left.get_idx(idx) = Option.some(f(k0)) }
proof: let w0: lib(fin).Fin[n.suc] satisfy { Option.some(w0) = fin_enum_suc(n).get_idx(idx) and Option.some(f(w0)) = map[lib(fin).Fin[n.suc], A](fin_enum_suc(n), f).get_idx(idx) }
let w1: lib(fin).Fin[n.suc] satisfy { Option.some(w1) = fin_enum_suc(n).get_idx(idx) and Option.some(f(w1)) = map[lib(fin).Fin[n.suc], A](fin_enum_suc(n), f).get_idx(idx) }
function(x0: lib(fin).Fin[n.suc]) { not (Option.some(x0) = fin_enum_suc(n).get_idx(idx) and Option.some(f(x0)) = left.get_idx(idx)) }(w0)
map[Nat, A](n.suc.range, fin_of_nat_suc_apply[A](n, f)).get_idx(idx) = Option.some(fin_of_nat_suc_apply[A](n, f, idx))
map[Nat, A](n.suc.range, fin_of_nat_suc_apply[A](n, f)).get_idx(idx) != Option.some(fin_of_nat_suc_apply[A](n, f, idx))
function[T0](x0: Nat, x1: lib(fin).Fin[x0.suc] -> T0, x2: Nat) { fin_of_nat_suc_apply[T0](x0, x1, x2) = x1(fin_of_nat_suc(x0, x2)) }[A](n, f, idx)

goal: left.length = right.length and forall(x0: Nat) { x0 < left.length implies left.get_idx(x0) = right.get_idx(x0) }
proof: let w0: Nat satisfy { w0 < left.length and left.get_idx(w0) != right.get_idx(w0) }
function(x0: Nat) { not x0 < left.length or right.get_idx(x0) = left.get_idx(x0) }(w0)
not forall(x0: Nat) { not x0 < left.length or left.get_idx(x0) = right.get_idx(x0) } or right.length != left.length
not forall(x1: Nat) { not x1 < left.length or left.get_idx(x1) = right.get_idx(x1) }
(forall(x2: Nat) { not x2 < left.length or left.get_idx(x2) = right.get_idx(x2) } = true)
function[T0](x0: Nat, x1: lib(fin).Fin[x0.suc] -> T0, x2: Nat) { fin_of_nat_suc_apply[T0](x0, x1, x2) = x1(fin_of_nat_suc(x0, x2)) }[A](n, f, k)
function(x0: Nat) { fin_value_or_zero[A](n.suc, f, x0) = value(x0) }(k)
function(x0: Nat) { fin_of_nat_suc_apply[A](n, f, x0) = enum_fun(x0) }(k)
function[T0: AddCommMonoid](x0: Nat, x1: lib(fin).Fin[x0] -> T0) { partial[T0](fin_value_or_zero[T0](x0, x1), x0) = fin_sum[T0](x0, x1) }[A](n.suc, f)
let w0: Nat satisfy { w0 < n.suc and value(w0) != enum_fun(w0) }
function(x0: Nat) { not x0 < n.suc or enum_fun(x0) = value(x0) }(w0)
function[T0: AddCommMonoid](x0: Nat, x1: Nat -> T0) { sum[T0](map[Nat, T0](x0.range, x1)) = partial[T0](x1, x0) }[A](n.suc, enum_fun)

goal: sum[A](map[lib(fin).Fin[n.suc], A](fin_enum_suc(n), f)) = sum[A](map[Nat, A](n.suc.range, enum_fun))
proof: map[lib(fin).Fin[n.suc], A](fin_enum_suc(n), f) != map[Nat, A](n.suc.range, enum_fun)
function(x0: Nat, x1: lib(fin).Fin[x0]) { lib(fin).Fin[x0.suc].new(lib(fin).Fin[x0].value(x1).suc) = Option.some(fin_succ(x0, x1)) }(n, i)

function[T3: Zero](x0: Nat, x1: lib(fin).Fin[x0], x2: Nat, x3: lib(fin).Fin[x0] -> T3) { Option.some(x1) != lib(fin_sum).fin_of_nat_option(x0, x2) or fin_value_or_zero[T3](x0, x3, x2) = x3(x1) }[A](n.suc, fin_succ(n, i), k.suc, f)
function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat) { lib(fin_sum).fin_of_nat_option(x0, x1) = lib(fin).Fin[x0].new(x1) }(n.suc, k.suc)

goal: fin_value_or_zero[A](n, fin_succ_apply[A](n, f), k) = fin_succ_apply[A](n, f, i)
proof: function[T3: Zero](x0: Nat, x1: lib(fin).Fin[x0], x2: Nat, x3: lib(fin).Fin[x0] -> T3) { Option.some(x1) != lib(fin_sum).fin_of_nat_option(x0, x2) or fin_value_or_zero[T3](x0, x3, x2) = x3(x1) }[A](n, i, k, fin_succ_apply[A](n, f))
function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat) { lib(fin_sum).fin_of_nat_option(x0, x1) = lib(fin).Fin[x0].new(x1) }(n, k)
function[T0](x0: Nat, x1: lib(fin).Fin[x0.suc] -> T0, x2: lib(fin).Fin[x0]) { fin_succ_apply[T0](x0, x1, x2) = x1(fin_succ(x0, x2)) }[A](n, f, i)

goal: fin_value_or_zero[A](n.suc, f, k.suc) = fin_value_or_zero[A](n, fin_succ_apply[A](n, f), k)
proof: fin_value_or_zero[A](n, fin_succ_apply[A](n, f), k) != f(fin_succ(n, i))
fin_value_or_zero[A](n, fin_succ_apply[A](n, f), k) = f(fin_succ(n, i))

goal: compose[Nat, Nat, A](value, Nat.suc, k) = value(k.suc)
proof: function[T0, T1, T2](x0: T1 -> T2, x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T0) { compose[T0, T1, T2](x0, x1, x2) = x0(x1(x2)) }[Nat, Nat, A](value, Nat.suc, k)
function(x0: Nat) { fin_value_or_zero[A](n.suc, f, x0) = value(x0) }(k.suc)
function(x0: Nat) { fin_value_or_zero[A](n, fin_succ_apply[A](n, f), x0) = tail_value(x0) }(k)
fin_value_or_zero[A](n, fin_succ_apply[A](n, f), k) = fin_value_or_zero[A](n.suc, f, k.suc)

goal: compose[Nat, Nat, A](value, Nat.suc, k) = tail_value(k)
proof: compose[Nat, Nat, A](value, Nat.suc, k) != value(k.suc)

goal: partial[A](compose[Nat, Nat, A](value, Nat.suc), n) = partial[A](tail_value, n)
proof: let w0: Nat satisfy { w0 < n and tail_value(w0) != compose[Nat, Nat, A](value, Nat.suc, w0) }
function(x0: Nat) { not x0 < n or compose[Nat, Nat, A](value, Nat.suc, x0) = tail_value(x0) }(w0)
w0 < n and tail_value(w0) != compose[Nat, Nat, A](value, Nat.suc, w0)
compose[Nat, Nat, A](value, Nat.suc, w0) = tail_value(w0)
function[T0: AddCommMonoid](x0: Nat, x1: lib(fin).Fin[x0] -> T0) { partial[T0](fin_value_or_zero[T0](x0, x1), x0) = fin_sum[T0](x0, x1) }[A](n, fin_succ_apply[A](n, f))
function(x0: Nat, x1: lib(fin).Fin[x0.suc], x2: Nat) { Option.some(x1) != lib(fin).Fin[x0.suc].new(x2) or fin_of_nat_suc(x0, x2) = x1 }(n, fin_zero(n), Nat.0)
function(x0: Nat) { fin_value_or_zero[A](n.suc, f, x0) = value(x0) }(Nat.0)

function[T3: Zero](x0: Nat, x1: lib(fin).Fin[x0], x2: Nat, x3: lib(fin).Fin[x0] -> T3) { Option.some(x1) != lib(fin_sum).fin_of_nat_option(x0, x2) or fin_value_or_zero[T3](x0, x3, x2) = x3(x1) }[A](n.suc, fin_zero(n), Nat.0, f)
function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat) { lib(fin_sum).fin_of_nat_option(x0, x1) = lib(fin).Fin[x0].new(x1) }(n.suc, Nat.0)

goal: value(Nat.0) + partial[A](compose[Nat, Nat, A](value, Nat.suc), n) = partial[A](value, n.suc)
f(fin_zero(n)) + fin_sum[A](n, fin_succ_apply[A](n, f)) = partial[A](value, n.suc)

proof: function[T0: AddCommMonoid](x0: Nat, x1: lib(fin).Fin[x0] -> T0) { partial[T0](fin_value_or_zero[T0](x0, x1), x0) = fin_sum[T0](x0, x1) }[A](n.suc, f)

goal: fin_sum[A](n.suc, f) = f(fin_zero(n)) + fin_sum[A](n, fin_succ_apply[A](n, f))
proof: f(fin_zero(n)) + fin_sum[A](n, fin_succ_apply[A](n, f)) != partial[A](value, n.suc)
